question.description: 要向百度AI问答提出的问题

name: baidu4

sampleInput.question: 什么是人工智能？请简要说明。

annotations.note: The annotated selector targets span.deep-search-text inside the model button. On the current page, the model button shows 'DS-V4 Pro' text. The deep thinking toggle may require first clicking the model-select-wrapper button to open a dropdown, then selecting deep thinking. The script handles both direct click and dropdown scenarios.

steps.name: 等待AI回答完成

annotations.reason: Simplified the extremely long nth-of-type path to target the thinking steps container by its stable class names while preserving the exact DOM structure path.
The answer is split across multiple ai-markdown blocks with cosd-markdown-content. Using $list to collect all markdown content blocks and joining them captures the complete answer.

steps.name: 提取思考过程和答案

userDescription: 打开目标网站（百度AI问答），点击深度思考按钮开启深度思考模式，将外部传入进来给本系统的问题（字符串）在目标网站的输入框中进行提问，提交问题后等待答案完全返回，提取其中的思考过程和答案，组装成json返回给外部。
